name: Aloha Stadium Swap Meet
tagline: Hawaii's iconic outdoor flea market with 400+ vendors — relocated to the upper Halawa lot while the new stadium is built.
parking: Park in the lower lot, enter through the Halawa gate. Parking is CASH ONLY
bestTime: Sunday mornings at 6:30am opening for best selection and fewer crowds. Wednesdays are least crowded
kamaaina: Kamaaina/military admission $1 with valid ID (general admission $2). Kids 11 and under free
talkStory: A local institution since the 1970s. The old stadium was demolished in 2025 for the New Aloha Stadium Entertainment District (opening 2029), but the swap meet relocated to the upper Halawa parking lot in October 2025 with improvements — repaved areas, centralized vendors, dedicated food truck section, big-top tent with live music, and modern restrooms. Over 400 vendors selling everything from aloha shirts and local crafts to fresh produce and plate lunches. Great for cheap souvenirs that aren't tourist-trap quality. The swap meet will stay at this location for 5-10 years during construction.
